title: run_thetastat_v1 — manifest contract for server-side doThetaStat compute
description: PLANNED. Validates POST /api/actions when type='run_thetastat'. Wraps `thetaStat do_stat <prefix> -win <win_bp> -step <step_bp>` to produce {sample}.win{N}.step{M}.pestPG at an arbitrary scale beyond the four pre-baked on disk. Blocked: requires per-sample .thetas.idx + .thetas.gz from `angsd -doThetas`, which are not currently mirrored to E:.
